ovenAdjustments.label: Low-temp home oven
ovenAdjustments.proTip: Extended bake times dry out dough; the extra hydration and sugar are essential for a tender, browned crust.

ovenAdjustments.label: Standard pizza range
ovenAdjustments.proTip: The sweet spot for NY Style. A baking steel is highly recommended here for maximum 'oven spring'.

ovenAdjustments.label: High-heat pizza oven
ovenAdjustments.proTip: Sugar will burn instantly at these temps. Keep the dough lean and the hydration lower to avoid a 'gum line'.

steps.label: Autolyse
steps.detail: Combine flour and water; rest 20-30 mins.

steps.label: Incorporate
steps.detail: Add IDY yeast and mix, then add salt.

steps.label: Knead
steps.detail: Knead 8-10 mins until smooth.

steps.label: Windowpane Test
steps.detail: Confirm gluten strength by stretching a thin membrane.

steps.label: Ball
steps.detail: Divide and tension into tight balls.

steps.label: Stretch
steps.detail: Push air from center to rim; do not touch the cornicione.

steps.label: Bake
steps.detail: Bake at 800F+ until spotted with char (leopard spotting).

steps.label: Autolyse
steps.detail: Combine flour and water; rest 20 mins.

steps.label: Incorporate
steps.detail: Add IDY and salt.

steps.label: Knead
steps.detail: Knead 10 mins until elastic.

steps.label: Kickstart
steps.detail: Rest at room temp to wake up yeast.

steps.label: Ball & Temper
steps.detail: Remove bulk, ball tightly, and let sit at room temp.

steps.label: Internal Temp
steps.detail: Balls should be relaxed and warm.

steps.label: Bake
steps.detail: Stretch gently and bake at high heat.

steps.label: Autolyse
steps.detail: Combine flour and cool water; rest 20 mins.

steps.label: Incorporate
steps.detail: Add IDY and salt.

steps.label: Knead
steps.detail: Knead 10 mins until smooth.

steps.label: Ball Immediately
steps.detail: Portion into balls before refrigerating.

steps.label: Temper
steps.detail: Remove from fridge 3.5 hours before bake.

steps.label: Elasticity
steps.detail: Dough should stay put when poked, not snap back.

steps.label: Bake
steps.detail: Avoid degassing the rim during stretching.

steps.label: Autolyse
steps.detail: Combine flour and cold water; rest 20 mins.

steps.label: Incorporate
steps.detail: Add IDY and salt.

steps.label: Gentle Knead
steps.detail: Knead until smooth; do not over-work.

steps.label: Ball
steps.detail: Place balls in individual oiled containers.

steps.label: Temper
steps.detail: Long ferments need more time to warm through.

steps.label: Handle with Care
steps.detail: Dough will be delicate; use plenty of launch flour.

steps.label: Autolyse
steps.detail: Combine flour, water, and sugar; rest 20 mins.

steps.label: Incorporate
steps.detail: Add IDY, then oil and salt.

steps.label: Knead
steps.detail: Knead vigorously for 10 mins for high gluten strength.

steps.label: Bulk Rise
steps.detail: Until doubled in size.

steps.label: Ball
steps.detail: Divide and tension into balls.

steps.label: Knuckle Stretch
steps.detail: Open to 14-16 inches until thin and translucent.

steps.label: Bake
steps.detail: Bake at 500-550F until cheese is bubbly and crust is golden brown.

steps.label: Autolyse
steps.detail: Combine flour, water, and sugar; rest 20 mins.

steps.label: Incorporate
steps.detail: Add IDY, oil, and salt.

steps.label: Knead
steps.detail: Knead until silky smooth.

steps.label: Ball Immediately
steps.detail: Portion before the fridge to ensure uniform cold fermentation.

steps.label: Temper
steps.detail: Remove from fridge 2 hours before baking.

steps.label: Poke Test
steps.detail: Dough should leave a slight indent that slowly fills back.

steps.label: Autolyse
steps.detail: Combine flour, water, and sugar; rest 20 mins.

steps.label: Incorporate
steps.detail: Add IDY, oil, and salt.

steps.label: Knead
steps.detail: Knead for 10 mins until tacky but strong.

steps.label: Ball
steps.detail: Place balls in oiled containers immediately.

steps.label: Temper
steps.detail: 2 hours at room temp is the minimum for NY style.

steps.label: Stretch
steps.detail: Stretch larger than a Neapolitan; keep thickness uniform.

steps.label: Autolyse
steps.detail: Combine flour, water, and sugar; rest 20 mins.

steps.label: Incorporate
steps.detail: Add IDY, oil, and salt.

steps.label: Knead
steps.detail: Knead until surface is silky.

steps.label: Ball
steps.detail: Tension balls well; dough will slacken over 3 days.

steps.label: Temper
steps.detail: Remove 2 hours before bake.

steps.label: Stretch
steps.detail: Dough will be very soft; handle with care to avoid holes.
